channel.title: The Codex Arundel
channel.description: Recent content on The Codex Arundel

item.title: About
item.description: Akwaaba 👋 I’m Vinci. This site is a mostly collection of random thoughts and experiments (maybe thought experiments too) that I find interesting. I mostly blog on computer science related topics but occasionally share other useful stuff. Get In Touch# Instagram Email Projects# My software contributions (mostly unfinished) are available on my Github page. Work# I currently work as a Freelancer on Fiverr. I am open to taking up a remote job position though.
